ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beatmaps" (
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beatmap */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the beatmap */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the beatmap */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the song */,
  "circle_size" REAL /* Circle size for the beatmap */,
  "overall_difficulty" REAL /* Overall difficulty setting */,
  "approach_rate" REAL /* Approach rate setting */,
  "drain_rate" REAL /* Drain rate setting */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the beatmap on osu! website */,
  "mod" TEXT /* Mod applied to the beatmap */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the beatmap with mod */,
  "length_no_mod" TEXT /* Length of the beatmap without mod */,
  "star_rating" REAL /* Star rating of the beatmap with mod */,
  "star_rating_no_mod" REAL /* Star rating of the beatmap without mod */,
  "song_no" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the song in the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beatmap was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beatmap was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the beatmap */,
  "favored_by" INTEGER /* Number of users who have favorited the beatmap */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the beatmap has been played */,
  "pass_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the beatmap has been passed */,
  "max_combo" INTEGER /* Maximum combo achievable on the beatmap */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the beatmap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmaps_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmaps_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES beatmap_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmaps_artist FOREIGN KEY ("artist") REFERENCES artists ("artist_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmaps_difficulty FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("difficulty_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmaps_mod FOREIGN KEY ("mod") REFERENCES mods ("mod_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist's music */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mods" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mod */,
  "mod_name" TEXT /* Name of the mod */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mod */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the beatmap */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_versions_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user recommends the beatmap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, content creator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of beatmaps played by the user */,
  "favorite_beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite beatmap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the beatmap */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the beatmap was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_views_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the beatmap */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the beatmap was downloaded */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of download (e.g., direct, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_downloads_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment has been removed */,
  "removed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who removed the comment */,
  "removed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for removing the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_comments_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_tags_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite event */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "favorited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beatmap was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_favorites_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beatmap_play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "beatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beatmap */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beatmap was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the play */,
  "max_combo" INTEGER /* Maximum combo achieved */,
  "miss_count" INTEGER /* Number of misses */,
  "mod_used" TEXT /* Mod used during the play */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beatmap_play_history_beatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("beatmap_id") REFERENCES beatmaps ("beatmap_id")
)
